title: Friendly Phantoms
description: A gamerule to stop phantoms from attacking.
body:
Friendly Phantoms is a small mod that adds a gamerule that stops phantoms from attacking. \
It doesn't stop them from spawning, letting you still farm them for that good ol' phantom membrane.

The phantoms attacking is off by default. \
You can use the command `/gamerule doPhantomsAttack [ true | false ]` to change the behaviour per world. \
Or simply set the gamerule in the gamerules menu on world creation.

The mod is completely server-sided but can be installed on the client for single player worlds.

Feel free to use this mod in modpacks hosted on Modrinth and/or CurseForge.
